{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ragnarus blade
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Ragnarus blade]] is a crimson [[sword]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
